overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-themed video game showing a rainy night walk through a neon-lit downtown district. The player character exits a covered arcade and walks along busy streets before crossing a large intersection with other pedestrians.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a covered commercial walkway illuminated by vibrant pink neon lights. The player walks past pedestrians and exits the covered area onto a rain-soaked street, transitioning from the sheltered pink-lit environment to the open urban street with mixed lighting.

slight turn to follow the curve of the sidewalk

pedestrian with red hair and black jacket walking alongside

segments.scene_description: Walking along the rain-soaked sidewalk with the pink neon sign now in the distance. The teal Shinonome Sounds storefront becomes prominent on the right while futuristic vehicles pass by on the left. The camera moves steadily forward through the moderate traffic environment.

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up as the player approaches a major intersection. The traffic light pole becomes prominent in the center of view while the red vertical billboard grows larger on the left. Pedestrians gather at the crosswalk as vehicles pass by on the wet streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: large pedestrian crosswalk with zebra stripes

events.description: stepping onto the crosswalk to begin crossing the wide intersection
black and yellow sports car passes through intersection while crossing

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection with a group of pedestrians, navigating between moving vehicles

entered.detail: tall skyscraper covered in multiple holographic advertisements and neon displays

segments.scene_description: The player crosses the wide yellow-striped crosswalk with other pedestrians, moving toward the towering holographic advertisement-covered skyscrapers ahead. Vehicles pass by on either side as the group navigates the rain-soaked intersection in the neon-lit city center.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a sheltered neon walkway into the expansive, rain-soaked heart of a cyberpunk city center. It begins within a covered commercial area bathed in vibrant pink light, moving past pedestrians before exiting onto a wet urban street where the lighting shifts to a mix of cool and warm tones. As the camera advances along the sidewalk, the pink glow recedes in the distance and the teal storefront of Shinonome Sounds emerges on the right while futuristic vehicles stream past on the left. The scene then opens up toward a major intersection, where a central traffic pole and a towering red vertical billboard become prominent as pedestrians gather at the curb. Finally, the camera moves across a wide yellow-striped crosswalk, navigating through the crowd and passing traffic toward a skyline of skyscrapers draped in massive holographic advertisements.
